_doc: L4 reproduction config (Phase 2.1): all-CIM baseline on the L4-anchored on-card-DRAM topology (mem_lpddr4x 24.2 GB/s). Set model per run; context=1024 matches the vendor anchor. Calibrated-anchor config (no provenance flags) -> the mechanism test target. The calibrated core (per-unit timing eqs + 24.2 anchor) is fixed in code, NOT here.
